query:
SELECT id, contactName, createdAt, teamMemberId, status, classification 
FROM calls 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Brice%' OR contactName LIKE '%Tim%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, createdAt, teamMemberId, status, classification 
FROM calls 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Brice%' OR contactName LIKE '%Tim%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10
